data.content: Shipment complete. Merged feature/terminal-light-theme into main and pushed to remote. Commits: c729c634fd63 (light theme feature), d2410939c25f (stash + tsconfig worktree exclusion + conflict resolution), 53f9867f9e5f (fix test failures: logLeaseAudit Promise.resolve wrapper + showKnot mock in 4 test files). All quality gates green: tsc clean, 208 test files / 2385 tests passing, build OK, lint 0 errors. CI green on remote (both CI and Coverage Badge succeeded). One rebase conflict resolved in settings-load.test.ts (kept both normalization test from remote and light theme test from feature branch).
